text.title: HAProxy / Nginx Load Balancer Configuration Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.root-cause: Relying on HAProxy defaults that do not match traffic profile.
antipattern.fix: Set all 6 timeouts explicitly per workload.

antipattern.symptom: HAProxy host reboot → site down 3 min.
antipattern.fix: Deploy active-active with keepalived or anycast.

antipattern.root-cause: Public frontend has no stick-table limit.
antipattern.fix: Add per-IP rate limit `http-request deny if { sc_http_req_rate(0) gt N }`.

antipattern.symptom: Bad backends stay in rotation; queries fail.
antipattern.root-cause: Generic TCP probe — MySQL up but read-only.
